actions.description: Creator is auto-enrolled as the case manager.
actions.title: Create case

actions.description: Source provenance is captured at intake.
actions.title: Create source

actions.description: Enters the review queue as proposed; never auto-approved.
actions.title: Create observation

actions.description: Safe-by-default policy: reject executables, quarantine unknown types.
actions.title: Upload evidence file

actions.description: No self-review without an audited admin override.
actions.title: Approve observation

actions.description: Isolates material pending a handling decision; excluded from reports.
actions.title: Quarantine evidence

actions.description: Approved material only; raw evidence bytes are never bundled.
actions.preserves_invariant: Partner export viewers receive approved report packages only
actions.title: Generate report package

actions.preserves_invariant: Partner export viewers receive approved report packages only
actions.title: Download report package

actions.description: Planned ORCA endpoint; lifecycle status change.
actions.title: Close case

actions.description: Planned ORCA endpoint; lifecycle status change.
actions.title: Archive case

invariants: Graph traversal uses approved relationships only
Partner export viewers receive approved report packages only

links.orca_basis: Sources referenced by a case's observations/evidence.
links.title: Case contains Source

links.orca_basis: Entities referenced by a case's observations (entities persist across cases).
links.title: Case contains Entity

links.orca_basis: Relationship.observation_ids — supporting observations must be approved.
links.title: Observation supports Relationship

links.orca_basis: The package's rendered report (approved material only).
links.title: Report Package includes Report

links.orca_basis: Manifest entries reference approved evidence by metadata + SHA-256 (no raw bytes).
links.title: Report Package includes Evidence Manifest
Review Decision applies to Evidence Item

links.orca_basis: AuditEvent.target_type/target_id — append-only record of a consequential action.
links.title: Audit Event records action on object

objects.description: A curated view over evidence; the unit of need-to-know access control.
objects.title: ORCA Case

objects.description: An authenticated actor with a global role (RBAC).
objects.title: ORCA User

objects.description: A user's active/inactive/revoked membership and case role in a case.
objects.title: ORCA Case Membership

objects.description: The provenance of an observation or evidence item.

properties.description: Sources are referenced by case-scoped objects in ORCA.
properties.title: Case ID

objects.title: ORCA Source

objects.description: A recorded fact awaiting or having human review. Atomic unit of truth.

properties.description: System-proposed vs analyst-created; proposals route to review.
properties.title: Origin

objects.title: ORCA Observation

objects.description: Case-scoped, hash-verifiable evidence. Raw bytes are never exported.

properties.description: Content-addressed pointer; bytes are never bundled into exports.
properties.title: Storage URI

objects.title: ORCA Evidence Item

objects.description: A canonical, deduplicated entity that persists beyond any single case.
objects.title: ORCA Entity

objects.description: A link between two entities; only approved relationships are traversable.
objects.title: ORCA Relationship

objects.description: The recorded human decision on a proposed observation/evidence/relationship.
objects.title: ORCA Review Decision

objects.description: An open review-queue work item awaiting an analyst decision.
objects.title: ORCA Task

objects.description: A draft/final report drawing only on approved evidence.
objects.title: ORCA Report

objects.description: An immutable partner-ready export: report + evidence manifest (hashes only).
objects.title: ORCA Report Package

objects.description: An append-only record of a consequential action. Never updated or deleted.
objects.title: ORCA Audit Event

permissions.notes: Manages the case and its roster; full read/write on case material.
Creates and curates case material; cannot decide reviews.
Decides review items; may also propose. No self-approval.
Reads case material and approved reports; cannot mutate or read raw bytes.
Approved report packages only — never raw observations, evidence, graph, or audit.
